description_long: This is a modern, minimalist sofa featuring a wide, flat wooden frame with a natural finish and clean, angular lines. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a smooth, gray fabric, both appearing as single, uniform cushions that are firmly attached to the frame. The sofa lacks armrests, giving it an open and accessible profile, and the backrest is straight and medium in height, providing support without being bulky. The legs are made of black metal, arranged in a sled style, and are positioned at the corners for stability and a contemporary look. The rear of the sofa showcases the wood grain of the frame, uninterrupted by any additional features or embellishments. This piece is well-suited for urban environments such as parks, public waiting areas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A minimalist wooden-framed sofa with gray upholstered seat and back cushions, black metal sled legs, and no armrests. The design is sleek, open, and contemporary.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat wooden frame, gray seat and back cushions, and black metal sled legs, with no armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the seat and back cushions, the straight backrest, and the sled-style metal leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous wooden back panel with visible wood grain and the black metal legs beneath.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the sofa's profile, cushion thickness, and leg design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, uniform seat and back cushions, both attached and spanning the full width of the sofa, with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: No armrests present; the wooden frame extends outward at seat level, creating a flat, open edge.
attribute_leg_design: Four black metal sled legs, positioned at the corners, with a rectangular profile and exposed, modern appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with a single attached cushion, no tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
